article.title: Synaptics Acquisition by Onsemi Affirms Edge AI Is for Real
article.summary: Hassane El-Khoury does it again, though his role in the interplay among power, sensing, computing, and connectivity has reversed this time around. In 2019, as the newly appointed CEO of Cypress
article.title_zh: Onsemi 收購 Synaptics 確認邊緣 AI 已成現實
article.summary_zh: Hassane El-Khoury 再次展現領導力，但這次他在電源、感測、運算和連接之間的角色已經反轉。

article.title: IBM chip-design 'breakthrough' weakens Huawei claims
article.summary: Both IBM and Huawei say three-dimensional designs could improve chip performance, but IBM may have gone one better.
article.title_zh: IBM 晶片設計「突破」削弱華為的主張
article.summary_zh: IBM 和華為都表示三維設計可以改善晶片性能，但 IBM 的表現可能更勝一籌。

article.title: Washington’s Foreign Ban on Anthropic’s Top Models May Backfire
article.summary: The move may act as a tailwind for rival China, boosting demand for the Asian nation’s open source AI.
article.title_zh: 華府對 Anthropic 頂級模型的禁令可能適得其反
article.summary_zh: 該舉措可能成為中國競爭對手的利好，提振亞洲國家開源 AI 的需求。

article.title: After Fable 5 ban, Anthropic and 19 organizations launch open source security body
article.summary: The arrival of frontier AI models capable of scanning major open-source projects and surfacing multiple vulnerabilities in a single pass has handed defenders an extraordinary tool — but one that attackers can access, too. Now, some of the biggest names in tech and industry are betting that the only way to stay ahead is to work together. The result is Akrites , launched on Thursday by the Linux Foundation, which serves as a coordinated body to handle vulnerability discovery, remediation, and disclosure for critical open-source software. Its founding roster spans some 20 organizations, among them AWS, Anthropic, Google, Microsoft and its GitHub subsidiary, OpenAI, Cisco, Red Hat, NVIDIA, Chainguard, Sonatype, Ericsson, Vodafone, Citi, and JPMorganChase. The initiative takes its name fr
article.title_zh: Fable 5 禁令後，Anthropic 與 19 個組織啟動開源安全機構
article.summary_zh: 能夠掃描主要開源項目並在一次掃描中發現多個漏洞的前沿 AI 模型為防守者提供了強大工具，但攻擊者也能夠使用。技術和產業的主要企業現在正押注於...

article.title: Asian AI startups launch Mythos-like  models as Anthropic’s export ban drags on
article.summary: New models are launching in Asia that promise Mythos-like capabilities without fear of an export ban. U.S. AI labs may never recover this enormous market.
article.title_zh: 亞洲 AI 新創推出類 Mythos 模型，因 Anthropic 出口禁令而獲利
article.summary_zh: 新的亞洲模型正在推出，承諾提供類似 Mythos 的功能，同時避免出口禁令的風險。美國 AI 實驗室可能永遠無法恢復這個龐大市場。

article.title: Australia to Strengthen Enforcement of Under-16 Social Media Ban
article.summary: Australia will grant its online safety watchdog more powers and increase the maximum penalty for breaches of its world-first social media ban, with Prime Minister Anthony Albanese saying big tech companies are not doing enough to comply.
article.title_zh: 澳洲加強執行 16 歲以下青少年社群媒體禁令
article.summary_zh: 澳洲將賦予線上安全監管機構更多權力，並提高違反世界首創社群媒體禁令的罰款上限，總理 Anthony Albanese 表示大型科技公司未能充分遵守規定。

article.title: ‘Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 6 Pro’ needed more words to prove its power, three other flagship chips coming
article.summary: Qualcomm’s Snapdragon chipset lineup is eternally confusing, with slight variations generating new names and options that aren’t all that different. But it sounds like the next few releases are going to be especially confusing, with several new chips in the works including the “Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 6 Pro.”
article.title_zh: 'Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 6 Pro' 需要更多詞彙來證明其實力，另有三款旗艦晶片推出
article.summary_zh: Qualcomm 的 Snapdragon 晶片組陣容一直令人困惑，細微變化產生的新名稱和選項差異不大。但接下來的幾個版本似乎會特別令人困惑。

article.title: Why everyone from OpenAI to SpaceX is building their own chips (and turning up the heat on Nvidia)
article.summary: Nvidia has dominated the AI chip market for years, but the era of total dependence might be ending.   OpenAI just shared its plans to spice things up with Jalapeño, its custom inference chip built with Broadcom, joining Google, Apple, and SpaceX in a growing list of companies building their way out of single-supplier risk. The goal is less of a […]
article.title_zh: 從 OpenAI 到 SpaceX，為什麼科技巨頭都在開發自家晶片（並對 Nvidia 施壓）
article.summary_zh: Nvidia 多年來主導 AI 晶片市場，但完全依賴的時代可能即將結束。OpenAI 分享了與 Broadcom 合作開發的自訂推論晶片 Jalapeño 計劃，加入 Google、Apple 和 SpaceX 等公司的行列。

article.title: 產品體驗平臺公司Pendo、雲端通訊服務廠商8×8受Klue供應鏈攻擊影響，Salesforce資料外洩
article.summary: 上週爆發的Klue供應鏈攻擊事故，已有超過10家公司證實受到影響，導致他們存放在Salesforce平臺的資料出現未經授權存取的現象，其中大部分是資安公司。如今有SaaS服務公司也受害。
article.title_zh: 產品體驗平臺公司Pendo、雲端通訊服務廠商8×8受Klue供應鏈攻擊影響，Salesforce資料外洩
article.summary_zh: 上週爆發的Klue供應鏈攻擊事故，已有超過10家公司證實受到影響，導致他們存放在Salesforce平臺的資料出現未經授權存取的現象，其中大部分是資安公司。如今有SaaS服務公司也受害。

article.title: 3 flagship Android phones are cheaper now than they were on day one of Prime Day, but not for long
article.summary: Prime Day is almost over, but a few of the best Android phone deals have somehow improved since the sale began. We spotted three flagship handsets that dropped to record-low prices on Tuesday, only to become a little cheaper as the event neared its final hours. That makes this a rare late-sale win if you held off earlier in the week. The Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra is now down to $919.99, which is $380 off its usual price. That is already a huge drop for one of Samsung’s top-tier flagships, but it’s also $30 cheaper than the $949.99 price we saw on day one of Prime Day.
article.title_zh: 3 款旗艦 Android 手機現價低於 Prime Day 首日價格，但不會持久
article.summary_zh: Prime Day 即將結束，部分最佳 Android 手機交易價格更優，三款旗艦機跌至歷史低價，時間有限。

article.title: 鬆綁 AI 監管！美國允許百家受信任企業使用 Anthropic Mythos 5 模型
article.summary: 美國商務部最新宣布允許 Anthropic 向部分「受信任合作夥伴」開放其強大的 Claude Mythos […]
article.title_zh: 鬆綁 AI 監管！美國允許百家受信任企業使用 Anthropic Mythos 5 模型
article.summary_zh: 美國商務部最新宣布允許 Anthropic 向部分「受信任合作夥伴」開放其強大的 Claude Mythos […]

article.title: Greptile, Cursor, and Devin agree that agents should run their code. What they run it against matters.
article.summary: The industry has recognized that shipping agent code at scale requires runtime verification, and it is moving that way fast. However, the scope of that verification remains limited for most teams. A consensus is forming in agentic development: To ship code from agents at scale, you have to enable them to verify their code at runtime. Static verification, reading the diff and running unit tests against mocks, is not enough.  The constraint is knowing whether what an agent produced actually works, and that answer only exists once the code runs. So the industry is moving verification out of the human review queue and into the agent’s own loop, giving agents a place to run their work and check it before a person ever sees the change.  “The industry has recognized that shi
article.title_zh: Greptile、Cursor 和 Devin 同意代理應該運行其代碼。它們針對什麼運行很重要。
article.summary_zh: 業界已認識到大規模交付代理代碼需要運行時驗證，並正快速朝著這個方向發展。在代理開發中形成共識：要大規模交付來自代理的代碼，必須啟用驗證功能。

article.title: The US government just told OpenAI who’s allowed to use the next GPT 5.6 model
article.summary: The release of leading AI foundation model technologies has reached a watershed moment. Just two weeks after Anthropic received a directive from the US government to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5, the White House this week has mandated that OpenAI place limitations on the release of its upcoming GPT 5.6 model due to cybersecurity concerns. This new directive stipulates that OpenAI’s GPT 5.6 can be made available only to a limited number of government-approved partners due to the advanced nature of its capabilities, according to a  CNN  source familiar with the situation. Initially reported on The Information Wednesday, the report references a staff Q&A session hosted by OpenAI CEO Sam Altman . A post on X stemming from the report explained that the federal
article.title_zh: 美國政府剛剛告訴 OpenAI 誰可以使用下一個 GPT 5.6 模型
article.summary_zh: 領先的 AI 基礎模型技術的發佈已達到一個分水嶺。在 Anthropic 收到美國政府停止 Fable 5 和 Mythos 5 存取權限的指令兩週後，白宮本週已要求 OpenAI 對其發佈進行限制...

article.title: 越聊越危險？最新研究揭露 AI 如何透過「放大螺旋」將人推向妄想邊緣

article.title: OpenAI upgrading ChatGPT and Codex with new GPT-5.6 models in limited release
article.summary: OpenAI is introducing GPT-5.6, its next-generation model, two months after the release of GPT-5.5. However, the rollout to customers won’t be as straightforward as previous model updates to ChatGPT and Codex.
article.title_zh: OpenAI 用新 GPT-5.6 模型升級 ChatGPT 和 Codex 有限發布
article.summary_zh: OpenAI 在發布 GPT-5.5 兩個月後推出下一代 GPT-5.6 模型，但向客戶的推出不如以往直接。

article.title: OpenAI details what to expect from the three new models in its GPT-5.6 preview
article.summary: TL;DR OpenAI is starting to preview its new GPT-5.6 models: Sol, Terra, and Luna Sol promises enhanced performance at cybersecurity tasks, while resisting efforts to weaponize its output. Terra and Luna are balanced for efficiency and reduced cost of operation. Right now, the introduction of new AI models is more politicalized than ever, following the abrupt government pushback against Anthropic’s Fable 5 and Mythos 5. Now that mess is only set to continue, as the White House sticks its nose all up in OpenAI’s business for the release of GPT-5.6. As we wait to see how all that will ultimately play out, OpenAI is now detailing exactly what we can expect from its new GPT-5.6 models. We’re actually looking at a trio of models that make up this latest generation: Sol, Terra, and Luna, all arri
article.title_zh: OpenAI 詳述 GPT-5.6 預覽三款新模型的預期功能
article.summary_zh: OpenAI 推預覽新 GPT-5.6 模型：Sol、Terra 和 Luna，分別針對網絡安全、成本效率等方面優化。
